content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Broad-based rally with Auto, IT, PSU Bank, Pharma all green; Nifty +0.39%, Bank Nifty +0.98%, VIX down 2.5%. Earnings season is generating clear winners (CAMS, COFORGE, M&M, HFCL, LALPATHLAB, ABCAPITAL) and the book is participating with HAL, PNBHOUSING, BANDHANBNK, NAVINFLUOR all green. Constructive backdrop for selective adds, but book is already well-deployed across multiple themes — discipline on cluster/sector caps matters more than chasing breakouts.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24000,
      "nifty_resistance": 24300
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1035.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "+7.6% unrealized; current SL 1040.66 is already above entry but flush with intraday low (1048). Trailing slightly down to 1035 (just below S1 1035.43, trail-gap ~2.2% below CMP 1058) gives breathing room while still locking in ~5.2% gain. Thesis intact: ICICI Sec TP 1350, Q4 PAT +19%, RBI rate-cut tailwind. Target 1110 holds — within 3% of CMP, near 52w-high resistance. Note: this LOOSENS SL from 1040.66 to 1035 — if guardrail rejects, keep SL at 1040.66."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "reasoning": "If MODIFY is rejected for SL-loosening, hold at 1040.66 SL / 1110 target. Position is well-managed."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "reasoning": "-1.1% on a defensive hedge; gold near 52w-high range with mixed crossover signals (MACD bearish, but holding above SMA20 123.70). SL 119 is well below CMP 123.78 (-3.9% trail-gap, appropriate for low-vol ETF). Thesis as macro hedge intact; no action."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1715.00,
      "new_target": 1820.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "reasoning": "Hit fresh 52w-high 1751 today; slight pullback to 1736 (+1.9%). Per trail-gap discipline, SL at 1715 sits 1.2% below CMP 1736 — within rules. Keeping SL at 1715 (= entry+0.9%, breakeven-plus) and target 1820. No-op MODIFY check: this DOES match stored values, so converting to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "reasoning": "SL 1715 already at breakeven+, trail-gap 1.2% below CMP — at the floor; tightening further would risk same-day stopout on normal chop. Strong Q4 print, all-time-high tape, MOSL TP 1900. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "reasoning": "Marginal -0.3%; SL 206 is 1% below CMP 208.13 — at the floor. Strong Q4 print (+68% PAT), 52w-high tape, Emkay TP 220. Banking sector +1% today is supportive. SL untouched (would loosen if raised flush with CMP). Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 4595.00,
      "new_target": 4875.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "reasoning": "+1.7% with strong intraday breakout (+2.1%); raising SL from entry 4575 to 4595 (slightly above breakeven, locking in ~0.4%). Trail-gap: 4595 vs CMP 4655.80 = 1.3% below CMP — within floor. Q4 results May 14 is a binary event 6 trading sessions away — outside the 3-session window so no event-trade rules trigger yet, but I will reassess next week. Target 4875 unchanged."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SOBHA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "reasoning": "-2.5% but Q4 print published yesterday was strong (PAT +125%, net-debt negative, FY26 sales +30%). Stock gapped up to 1472 then faded to 1438 — typical post-result fade after prior-day rally. SL 1420 is 1.3% below CMP 1438.20 — at floor. Original thesis intact; hold to SL 1420 or target 1570."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 6950.00,
      "new_target": 7400.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "reasoning": "+2.2% with strong continuation (+3.4% today). SL already at 6950 = entry+0.7% (locked in), trail-gap 1.1% below CMP 7030 — at floor. No-op check: stored SL 6950, stored target 7400 = identical. Converting to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "reasoning": "SL 6950 at breakeven+, trail-gap 1.1% — at floor. Chemours commissioning catalyst June/July. Hold to target 7400."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 815.00,
      "new_target": 900.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "reasoning": "+0.1% but day's high was 862.70 (+9.5% intraday) before fading to 842.50 (gap-up partially digested). Raising SL from 800 to 815 (trail-gap 815 vs CMP 842.50 = 3.3% below CMP, comfortable cushion for cap-goods volatility). Locks in entry-2.7% rather than entry-4.5%. Target 900 unchanged."
    },
    {
      "action": "BUY",
      "symbol": "HFCL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "MIS",
      "quantity": 600,
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "price": 133.50,
      "stop_loss": 130.50,
      "target": 138.50,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "INTRADAY",
      "reasoning": "Strong momentum: Q4 turnaround (PAT +Rs 184cr vs -Rs 83cr loss), order book Rs 21,206cr at ATH, +6.24% today on 3.1x volume, holding tight intraday range 131-133 above VWAP 130.93. MIS intraday momentum trade — entry 133.50, SL 130.50 (-2.25%, ~Rs 1,800 risk on 600 qty = 0.18% portfolio risk, well within 0.5% cap), target 138.50 (+3.75%, R:R 1:1.67). Position size: 600×133.50=Rs 80,100 = ~8% of portfolio, well within cap. Will square off by 3:00 PM. Note: stock has rallied 96% in a month — using small-size intraday MIS rather than CNC to avoid mean-reversion overnight risk."
    },
    {
      "action": "BUY",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 135,
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "price": 369.00,
      "stop_loss": 358.00,
      "target": 388.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Q4 PAT +30% YoY (ex one-off), NBFC disbursements +28%, Advent infusion at Rs 19,250cr post-money validates SOTP, consensus TP 388.92 (~5% upside), 12 analysts Strong Buy. Breakout above prior 52w-high 369.30 today on 2.4x volume. Entry 369, SL 358 (-3%, risk Rs 1,485 = 0.15% of portfolio), target 388 (+5.1%, R:R 1:1.73). Position size: 135×369=Rs 49,815 = ~5% of portfolio. Cluster check: portfolio has PNBHOUSING (HFC) + BANDHANBNK (bank) — ABCAPITAL is diversified financial holdco (NBFC+AMC+insurance), different sub-segment; combined financials weight stays ~22% — within cluster discipline. No regulatory red flags found in research. Within 1-cluster-add limit for the session."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1040.66 sits 1.7% below CMP 1058.40 — already at trail-gap floor. Cannot tighten without violating 1% floor. Hold."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defensive ETF position; SL 119 has appropriate trail-gap (-3.9%) for low-vol instrument."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1715 = breakeven+, trail-gap 1.2% — at floor. ATH tape, strong Q4."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 206 trail-gap 1% — at floor. Q4 turnaround thesis intact, banking sector strong."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 4595.00,
      "reasoning": "Raise SL from entry 4575 to 4595 to lock breakeven-plus; trail-gap 1.3%."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SOBHA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 print strong; holding SL 1420 (1.3% below CMP). Original thesis intact; no premature exit on intraday post-result fade."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 6950 = breakeven+, trail-gap 1.1% — at floor."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 815.00,
      "reasoning": "Tighten SL from 800 to 815 after gap-up day (high 862.70). Trail-gap 3.3% appropriate for cap-goods volatility."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "M&M, COFORGE, CAMS — strong Q4 prints with gap-ups but extended; would re-engage on a constructive pullback to gap-fill or VWAP. LALPATHLAB hit 20% upper circuit on Q4 — keep on radar for swing entry once consolidation appears. VEDL near 52w-high on metals theme but pass for now (already have ADANIPORTS as cyclical exposure). PSUBNKBEES research turned bearish (PSU bank index -5% on May 6 weak prints) — DROP from active watchlist; do not buy. RRKABEL flat margins post Q4 disappointing despite volume surge — pass. POLYCAB awaiting result reaction. AUROPHARMA, BIOCON, MARICO not data-rich today — defer. GABRIEL margin compression in Q3, premium 59x PE — skip.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Deployed 43% before today's adds; with HFCL MIS + ABCAPITAL CNC (combined ~13%), deployment moves to ~56% — comfortably within 80% soft target. Cash buffer remains ~44% post-fills. Sector mix: Financials cluster (PNBHOUSING + BANDHANBNK + ABCAPITAL) ~22% — at cluster-attention threshold; will NOT add another financial today. Defense (HAL), Cap-Goods (TITAGARH), Realty (SOBHA), Chemicals (NAVINFLUOR), Services (ADANIPORTS), ETF (GOLDBEES) — well diversified. HAL Q4 results May 14 = 6 sessions away, outside 3-session binary window for now; will revisit by Day-22. Win rate 17% over 5 days is concerning but profit factor 1.5x indicates winners are larger than losers — discipline on R:R is working; continuing to lean on the trailing-SL playbook to protect winners."
}
